title: Operator enrollment request (v1alpha1)
description: Body the Operator sends to POST /v1/enroll to exchange a one-time enrollment token for its own instance key pair. TARGET-STATE contract. Contains NO long-lived secret; the token is single-use and short-lived.

enrollment_token.description: One-time, short-lived token issued by the Hub. Exchanged exactly once.

instance_public_key.description: Public half of the key pair the Operator generated locally; the private key never leaves the instance.

hostname_hint.description: Non-identifying label for operator UX only.
